query_result.reasoning: So approximately 10.23 years. Let me now compile the full answer.

tool_calls.name: submit_final_result
tool_calls.args:
{"final_result": "## Segment-Level FCF Proxy Analysis (Q1 2026)

All figures are in **millions of dollars** and reflect the recast consolidated entity (SpaceX + xAI + X Holdings under common-control accounting).

---

### Step 1: Retrieve Q1 2026 Segment Data

| Metric | Space | Connectivity | AI |
|---|---:|---:|---:|
| **Segment Adjusted EBITDA** | $(351) | $2,087 | $(609) |
| **Capital Expenditures** | $1,052 | $1,332 | $7,723 |

---

### Step 2: Calculate FCF Proxy (Adj. EBITDA − Capex)

| Segment | Q1 2026 FCF Proxy | Annualized (×4) |
|---|---:|---:|
| **Space** | −$1,403 | −$5,612 |
| **Connectivity** | **$755** | **$3,020** |
| **AI** | −$8,332 | −$33,328 |

**Calculations:**
- Space: −$351 − $1,052 = **−$1,403M**
- Connectivity: $2,087 − $1,332 = **$755M**
- AI: −$609 − $7,723 = **−$8,332M**

---

### Step 3: How Many Years of Connectivity Annualized FCF Proxy Fund One Year of AI Capex?

| Component | Value |
|---|---:|
| AI capex at Q1 2026 run-rate (annualized) | $7,723 × 4 = **$30,892M** |
| Connectivity FCF proxy at Q1 2026 run-rate (annualized) | $755 × 4 = **$3,020M** |

$$\text{Years} = \frac{\$30{,}892\text{M}}{\$3{,}020\text{M}} \approx \boxed{10.23 \text{ years}}$$

---

### Interpretation

At Q1 2026 run-rates, it would take approximately **10.2 years** of Connectivity's annualized free cash flow generation (the only segment with positive FCF proxy) to fund a single year of AI segment capital expenditures. This underscores the massive capital intensity of the AI/data center buildout relative to the company's current cash-generating capacity — the AI segment alone consumed over 76% of total Q1 2026 capex ($7.7B of $10.1B), while Connectivity was the sole segment producing a positive FCF proxy.

**Sources:**
- SpaceX S-1 Filing (May 20, 2026): https://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/1181412/000162828026036936/spaceexplorationtechnologi.htm"}

## Segment-Level FCF Proxy Analysis (Q1 2026)

All figures are in **millions of dollars** and reflect the recast consolidated entity (SpaceX + xAI + X Holdings under common-control accounting).

---

### Step 1: Retrieve Q1 2026 Segment Data

| Metric | Space | Connectivity | AI |
|---|---:|---:|---:|
| **Segment Adjusted EBITDA** | $(351) | $2,087 | $(609) |
| **Capital Expenditures** | $1,052 | $1,332 | $7,723 |

---

### Step 2: Calculate FCF Proxy (Adj. EBITDA − Capex)

| Segment | Q1 2026 FCF Proxy | Annualized (×4) |
|---|---:|---:|
| **Space** | −$1,403 | −$5,612 |
| **Connectivity** | **$755** | **$3,020** |
| **AI** | −$8,332 | −$33,328 |

**Calculations:**
- Space: −$351 − $1,052 = **−$1,403M**
- Connectivity: $2,087 − $1,332 = **$755M**
- AI: −$609 − $7,723 = **−$8,332M**

---

### Step 3: How Many Years of Connectivity Annualized FCF Proxy Fund One Year of AI Capex?

| Component | Value |
|---|---:|
| AI capex at Q1 2026 run-rate (annualized) | $7,723 × 4 = **$30,892M** |
| Connectivity FCF proxy at Q1 2026 run-rate (annualized) | $755 × 4 = **$3,020M** |

$$\text{Years} = \frac{\$30{,}892\text{M}}{\$3{,}020\text{M}} \approx \boxed{10.23 \text{ years}}$$

---

### Interpretation

At Q1 2026 run-rates, it would take approximately **10.2 years** of Connectivity's annualized free cash flow generation (the only segment with positive FCF proxy) to fund a single year of AI segment capital expenditures. This underscores the massive capital intensity of the AI/data center buildout relative to the company's current cash-generating capacity — the AI segment alone consumed over 76% of total Q1 2026 capex ($7.7B of $10.1B), while Connectivity was the sole segment producing a positive FCF proxy.

**Sources:**
- SpaceX S-1 Filing (May 20, 2026): https://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/1181412/000162828026036936/spaceexplorationtechnologi.htm
